heading: AWS PrivateLink
body:
The HTTP Service Discovery method for AWS PrivateLink also contains the
`url` field with the following variables that you should define with
your values:

> **Note:** Each private endpoint handles metric scraping for a single region.
> For multi-region clusters, you must specify different scrape
> configurations for the Prometheus instances in each regions.

| Field        | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| ------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| group\_id    | Unique string that identifies the Atlas project. For example, 5f4a8b9c1d2e3f4a5b6c7d8e.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| endpoint\_id | AWS PrivateLink Endpoint ID (format: vpce-xxxxxxxxxxxxx). For example, vpce-0a1b2c3d4e5f6g7h8. To find your endpoint ID, do one of the following steps:In the Atlas UI, go to the Network Access tab, Private Endpoint section, and copy the Endpoint ID value.In the AWS Console, go to the VPC service, Endpoints section, and copy the VPC Endpoint ID value for your Atlas endpoint. |

```yaml
global:
  scrape_interval: 10s
  evaluation_interval: 10s

scrape_configs:
  - job_name: "Cloud-Testing-mongo-metrics"
    scrape_interval: 10s
    scrape_timeout: 10s
    metrics_path: /metrics
    scheme : https
    basic_auth:
      username: prom_user_618d48e05277a606ed2496fe
      password: fSIMUngfTmOTVEB4
    http_sd_configs:
      - url: https://cloud.mongodb.com/prometheus/v1.0/groups/{group_id}/discovery?targetScheme=PRIVATE_ENDPOINT&endpointId={endpoint_id}
        refresh_interval: 60s
        basic_auth:
          username: prom_user_618d48e05277a606ed2496fe
          password: fSIMUngfTmOTVEB4
    relabel_configs:
      - source_labels: [__metrics_path__]
        target_label: __metrics_path__
      - source_labels: [__instance__]
        target_label: instance
```

codeBlocks.content:
global:
  scrape_interval: 10s
  evaluation_interval: 10s

scrape_configs:
  - job_name: "Cloud-Testing-mongo-metrics"
    scrape_interval: 10s
    scrape_timeout: 10s
    metrics_path: /metrics
    scheme : https
    basic_auth:
      username: prom_user_618d48e05277a606ed2496fe
      password: fSIMUngfTmOTVEB4
    http_sd_configs:
      - url: https://cloud.mongodb.com/prometheus/v1.0/groups/{group_id}/discovery?targetScheme=PRIVATE_ENDPOINT&endpointId={endpoint_id}
        refresh_interval: 60s
        basic_auth:
          username: prom_user_618d48e05277a606ed2496fe
          password: fSIMUngfTmOTVEB4
    relabel_configs:
      - source_labels: [__metrics_path__]
        target_label: __metrics_path__
      - source_labels: [__instance__]
        target_label: instance
